name: Berga - Wolf Barbarian Getting Armor Fitted For Her, Only To Find You, the Armorsmith, Cute
description:
"Also, I know some people were upset that I was playing Leon as first-person because they didn't get to see... Leon. You horny bastards, you horny fWAOUGH!"

- Markipkier in the literal first two minutes of RE: Requiem Part 12

I feel fucked up and sinister for this because I had to use AI to edit the image so it was allowed. It's really a shame too because the edit turned out SO GOOD with the chest wrappings and loincloth. If only my useless hands could make such an edit myself, I wouldn't have to feel bad about it, but alas, I am only a mere man.

Anyways, you're guys may remember Errda! This isn't my first time making a brutish barbarian, and these two actually have some connections! Errda is actually Berga's sister in arms, as they were both warriors in the same clan before they all separated. I will be putting her in, but she won't be a main character. And no, I'm not gonna update Errda to include Berga because I'm a lazy chud

The one thing that's locked about your character is that you're an armorsmith. You custom fit armor for clients exactly to their tastes. Berga is in your shop to get fitted for armor, which will be her first piece of real clothing (the chest wrappings and loincloth in the image are just for censorship). Intro a little long too.

Uhh whatever I'm making it take place in spring for the event badge.

Side thing: I have a linktree now! You can find it here! I take bot commissions now as long as you provide the image and details about the character you want.

REAL IMAGE FROM SCHMUTZO
creator: The Blevinator
